items.title: AGI-Elo: How Far Are We From Mastering A Task?

items.summary: A current-facing evaluation paper that asks how close frontier models are to mastering real tasks, connecting capability measurement with practical deployment questions.

items.title: RoboAtlas: Mapping the Global Robotics Landscape

items.authorsShort: J. Zhang, S. Sun, V. Charisi, X. Wang, X. Chen, et al.
items.summary: A late-breaking result on mapping the global robotics landscape with structured, web-grounded analysis at robot-model scale rather than only company or market-report level.

items.title: Where can AI be used? Insights from a deep ontology of work activities

items.summary: A current-facing paper that reflects the move toward understanding where AI can productively augment human work through a structured ontology of activities.
